colors.gradient_text: bg-clip-text text-transparent bg-gradient-to-br from-white via-blue-100 to-slate-400

layout_and_spacing.grid_features: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 md:gap-8

surfaces_and_shapes.cards: bg-slate-900/40 border border-slate-800 rounded-xl hover:border-blue-500/50 hover:bg-slate-800/60 transition-all duration-300 relative overflow-hidden group

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white font-black py-4 px-8 rounded-md transform hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-200 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(59,130,246,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(59,130,246,0.6)] flex items-center justify-center gap-2 uppercase tracking-widest
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-slate-700 hover:border-slate-400 text-white font-bold py-4 px-8 rounded-md transform hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-200 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 uppercase tracking-wider
buttons.outline_accent: border border-blue-500/30 hover:border-blue-400 bg-blue-500/10 hover:bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-400 font-bold py-3 px-6 rounded-md uppercase tracking-wider transition-all

surfaces_and_shapes.dividers: Use CSS clip-path arbitrary values in Tailwind for angular sections (e.g., `[clip-path:polygon(0_0,100%_0,100%_90%,0_100%)]` or skewing `skew-y-[-2deg]`)

animations.glow_pulse: animate-pulse (subtle opacity changes for background glowing orbs)

media.instructions: STRICT RULE: NO EXTERNAL IMAGES OR STOCK PHOTOS. Use pure CSS aesthetics: radial gradients for glowing ambient lights (e.g., absolute positioning, bg-blue-600/20, blur-3xl, rounded-full), typographic scale, and lucide-react icons.

component_structure.nav: Sticky header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-slate-950/80 border-b border-slate-800/50), featuring Logo text, Sign In link, and Start Recruiting CTA.
component_structure.hero: High-impact command center. Left-aligned heavy typography. H1 uses gradient_text. Sub-headline in text-muted. Two buttons. Trust signal line (e.g. 'Trusted by 50+ NCAA Programs'). Ambient blue & orange CSS glows in the background.
component_structure.stats_ribbon: Angular banner (using skew or clip-path) cutting across the page. Background bg-blue-900/20 with border-y border-blue-800/50. 3 stats blocks: '200+ Players', '15 Divisions', 'Free Forever'. Numbers in primary or secondary accent.
component_structure.how_it_works: 3 steps displayed in large cards. Incorporate massive, low-opacity absolute-positioned step numbers (e.g., '1', '2', '3') in the background of each card using `text-slate-800/50`.
component_structure.features_grid: 6 features (Search UK Prospects, Verified Players, Recruiting Board, Match Scoring, Free for Coaches, NCAA Compliant) in a 3x2 grid. Use Lucide icons: Search, Target, Users, Zap, Award, Shield. Interactive hover states with blue glow.
component_structure.bottom_cta: High energy final conversion section. Strong angular container, dense typography, massive primary CTA.
component_structure.footer: Minimalist dark footer. Links to Privacy (/privacy), Terms (/terms), and Player App (/). Text in slate-500, hover to slate-300.

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='nav-login-link', data-testid='hero-register-button', data-testid='feature-card').

instructions_to_main_agent: The page must be a single self-contained React component exported as default.
Use react-router-dom (Link, useNavigate) for routing: /coach/register and /coach/login.
Use lucide-react for all visual iconography.
DO NOT use tags or background-image URLs. Rely 100% on Tailwind CSS, borders, gradients, and box-shadows to create a premium sporty tech aesthetic.
Ensure the design feels highly angular and dynamic, matching the 'Elite Athleticism' archetype.
